snapshot.eyebrow: HQDM Search Intelligence · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.title: Elev8 Centers
snapshot.subtitle: Q2 2026 · NYC · Harlem pin · Client Snapshot
snapshot.footer: Client snapshot · Q2 2026 · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.exec_html: Your Harlem pin is the only NYC addiction-treatment provider that gained ground on all eight tracked Maps searches last quarter — +787 grid positions with zero losses — and you own the Harlem-neighborhood searches outright (positions 1–2). The next leg is structural: your homepage is trying to rank for nine different commercial searches at once. Splitting it into dedicated pages, building borough hubs, and adding MAT and dual-diagnosis service hubs unlocks page-one candidates you don't have today.
snapshot.boxes_reading_html: Organic visitors, Maps visibility, and form-submit leads are the clean signals this quarter. GMB clicks and phone-link clicks are tracked separately (Jul 2025 onward) and shown in the strategic dashboard, not bundled into leads here. The current month is partial.

competitors.title: Competitor Movement · Maps
competitors.note_html: You're #1 on Maps across these searches (425 top-3 cells, +105) and gained more than any competitor; Ascendant is the nearest challenger (+88). Lower avg rank is better.
